description: Disposable paper napkins / lunch napkins / party napkins with djolletry motif - tiger, zebra, giraffe and leaves. Material: tissue, paper, FSC certified, size: approx. 33 x 33 cm (unfolded) or 16.5 x 16.5 cm (folded). Folding: 1/4 fold. Contents: 20 napkins. Colour: green, orange, yellow, white. - 3-ply, absorbent, soft & skin-friendly - Made of high-quality fabric, made in the EU - Chlorine-free bleached, premium napkin print with water-based colours - Environmentally friendly, recyclable & sustainable, from renewable sources - The packaging film is made of recyclable PP Our high quality exotic animal themed napkins are ideal for an exciting safari or jungle style table setting. The vibrant design features a majestic tiger, elegant giraffe and zebra among lush tropical leaves. These disposable napkins are perfect for themed parties, children's birthdays, summer parties or adventure events. Made from sustainable, FSC-certified pulp, the cellulose napkins are environmentally friendly, sustainable and offer the highest quality. These motif napkins are also ideal for creative craft projects such as decoupage or DIY decoration in jungle style.
